reviews.text:
The coffee was so good as always. The issue is the cashier asked if I need a receipt and I really didn't need it.

After 30 min I wanted to go to the toilet and the girl didn't let me as I MUST HAVE a receipt !

Why then the guy didn't tell me that or hold a sign on the wall mentioning it as a rule?!

I was really full and had to check for any nearby toilet. In another country, this branch would be closed !

The sweetest thing anyone's ever done for me . So sweet of the barista, made me feel special. Thank you he is special too and so kind to make another person feel special . I have kept the cup as a reminder also all the staff are always so sweet, smiley and helpful

This is my favorite Starbucks in the city.

Super friendly staff, a nice interior, and a great location. Even in the morning it’s not too crowded — and did I mention how incredibly nice the staff is here?

Always happy to stop by whenever I’m in town. ☺️

Why is the indian girl employee so rude?
Sweetheart youre a starbucks barista, not an executive at jpmorgan.😆 Tone the attitude down!
Also the toilets are so stinky and the flush wasnt even working. At least the coffee was fine!

Food and drinks were good, atmosphere was nice but the woman who served my drink was quite rude. I don’t know her name but she has dark hair and is tall, maybe late 30’s or in her 40s, has what sounds like a foreign accent. I asked her for sleeves for the cups and I never got a response just got a weird look and them put down at me and then I asked her nicely for a third one for the third drink and she looked at me weird again and said “ it’s not extra hot” to which I replied “ Oh I know, I just prefer a sleeve, it’s easier to hold” and she replied “ well that’s a waste” and pretty much flung the sleeve at me. I work at Starbucks and I know we are only meant to put sleeves on the cups if they are extra hot, a tea or an Americano but if the customer asks we’re are aloud to give them. Personally, I don’t waste them, I keep the sleeves to use for other drinks until I can’t use them anymore. This woman acted as if I just asked her the world.
Served by Hassan first time to London he was very polite and remembered our drinks we had earlier today. Really nice thank u Hassan.
The most watery flat white I’ve ever had! Looked like americano with a little bit of milky foam, bitter and tasteless!

Depends on your mood atmosphere Starbucks

Downstairs all normal

Upstairs has more comfy chairs&sofas

Toilets are CLEAN

ALSO had an issue with an Employee about GOLD MEMBER about FREE syrup&Whip Cream which I had to explain the word FREE
Which means it’s FREE, which means you can have what quantity you want without paying because there’s no LIMIT

Long story short she still didn’t acknowledge how I was explaining the word FREE&Gave it with anger

Also if your at Starbucks&see people misbehaving, tell the management&get them out because people like to accept what there doing wrong&ignore&won’t speak up while trying to enjoy there café or frap or whatever which don’t add up

BUT overall good location

I was greeted by a lovely man who served me, he was extremely polite and friendly.
As I was waiting for my drink, the lady worker asked if I was waiting for a certain drink, I said yes, and she let me know it's coming now. As she noticed I had a crutch she asked me if I needed any help taking my drinks to a seat, and said she would help me, i let her know i have someone with me, and she was extremely wholesome. Wished me a lovely day and take care. 10/10 for service.

I still giving 5 stars even I’m not happy with one woman at the counter today. She should have not be at the front if she could not control her emotions. Other 2 staffs today still remain Great service but her…

Lovely and spacious place and I like 1 st floor area just outside Tottenham court station . The costumer service young girl so she seems not happy to work but it was that bad. I like it this is one if the best Starbucks in the city .

Have to agree with the other reviews...people sleeping on the sofas, disgusting toilets (one still out of order) and a general feel of uncleanness not to mention unhygenic.
I love Starbucks, they are my favourite coffee chain, but this sadly is one to avoid

When I clearly slammed the donut, the seller ordered another cake, but not a donut. When you want to scan the application, you will be refused .When it was time to pick up the order, they simply handed me two drinks, seeing that my hands were full. When I asked for a coaster, the staff unanimously ignored me. Then, when I asked to put the drinks in the coaster, the employee knocked over my drink and tried to shove it at me so that I could take it. I asked for a redo, since I paid for a normal drink and not for a half-empty glass. And they gave me a second drink with a nutcase. People like that should be fired and given jobs to normal people.

The ladies working during the closing shift this past Friday Oct 10th were great - however at around 745pm some men came into the store to the ladies at the till and were verbally abusive & loud / one spat at the woman working the tills. This Starbucks location should employ a security guard to protect the staff.

This has got to be the “sorry-est” cup of tea ever served. I asked for hot milk to ensure optimum temperature based on previous experience with Starbucks elsewhere. What I was served is lukewarm muddy water. Really annoying as I was truly looking forward to it.

Only one toilet room available, so there was a considerable queue outside of it. Bins were full, so it was unpleasant to see the trash around it. Even the Chai Latte I had was not as good as I remember it from other Starbucks branches.

Staff members were not friendly, no smiling, talking with each other no customer service whatsoever, tables were dirty. Felt really unwelcome, we are fans of Starbucks but can’t say was satisfied with the coffee either
We came for the tiramisu drink but it was not available… why you keep promoting this on your screens if you don’t provide it anymore..
Premium priced coffee and terrible toilet! Sort it out! Staff are nice though, good customer service.
Baristas were really friendly and made some great coffee. Shout out to Barista Nelmar! Appreciate it!
